title: SZMDLX 3 Pack Tomato Cage, 48 Inches Large Tomato support Adjustable Green Sturdy Garden Plant Support Stake Garden Trellis Vertical Climbing Plants Support for Vegetables, Flowers, Fruit Grow ﻿
features: 【Material】The garden stakes are made of high quality iron wire and covered with green coating, compared to wood material, it is more firm and supportive in bad weather, not easy to fade or break. Reusable, rustproof, weatherproof, strong and durable.

【Adjustable Combination】You can assemble it into a 48.43 inch plant cage or adjust the height of the stakes to form different shapes of plant cages, not only triangle, but also frame lattice, tomato tower, rows, triangles, squares, hexagons, hanging everything depends on your needs and plant size

【Sturdy and Durable】The tomato plant support stakes are made of heavy-duty steel core and covered with durable green plastic coating for weatherproof and anti-rust, which does not affect the aesthetics and can serve you for a long time and never rust. The striped non-slip design also gives your fruits and vegetables a strong and stable grip

【Multifunctional Tomato Support】This garden plant cage is designed to support plants, fruits or vegetables and encourage them to grow vertically. Suitable for growing climbing plants such as tomatoes, peas, beans, grapes, roses, peppers, cucumbers, ivy, clematis, jasmine, blackberries, etc

【Easy to Assemble】These large tomato cages can be quickly assembled or disassembled without additional garden tools or accessories, requiring minimal time and effort. The height corresponds to the maximum height of most tomato plant varieties. After harvesting, they are easy to disassemble and take up little space, easy and convenient to store
Note: Once you have inserted the support poles, please rotate them for a better bite to prevent loosening. And turn in the opposite direction when removing
